questions.question: What types of pets can I create portraits for?
questions.answer: Dogs, cats, rabbits, birds, and even hamsters! Our AI works with virtually any pet. The key is having a clear photo of your pet's face with good lighting.

questions.question: How long does it take to generate a portrait?
questions.answer: Most portraits are ready in 20-40 seconds! Our AI analyzes your pet's unique features and applies your chosen style incredibly fast. Complex styles may take up to 60 seconds.

questions.question: What photo quality do I need?
questions.answer: Phone photos work perfectly! Just ensure: good lighting (natural light is best), your pet's face is clearly visible, and the image isn't blurry. Our AI will analyze photo quality and give you tips before generating.

questions.question: How many portraits can I create?
questions.answer: It depends on your credits! You get 2 free credits when you sign up. Each portrait costs 1 credit. Purchase credit packs anytime - they never expire. Check our Pricing page for available packs.

questions.question: What file format will I receive?
questions.answer: You'll receive high-resolution PNG images (up to 2048×2048 pixels) perfect for printing, sharing on social media, or creating custom merchandise like mugs, pillows, and phone cases.

questions.question: Can I choose specific art styles?
questions.answer: Absolutely! Choose from 8+ unique styles including Cinematic Style, Merry Christmas, Royal Portrait, Retro Pop Art, and more. Each style is optimized to preserve your pet's unique features while applying artistic magic.

questions.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the result?
questions.answer: We've got you covered! If you're not happy, we'll refund your credit immediately - no questions asked. You can then try a different style or adjust your photo. We also offer free regeneration for technical issues.

questions.question: Where can I view all my created portraits?
questions.answer: Visit your Dashboard to see all your creations! You can download them anytime, share to our public gallery to earn a free credit, or create custom Art Cards for social media.

questions.question: Can I edit or modify the generated portrait?
questions.answer: While you can't directly edit the AI output, you can regenerate with different styles or add custom prompts (like 'wearing a hat' or 'on the beach') to customize the scene while keeping your pet's features intact.

questions.question: How can I improve the quality of my portrait?
questions.answer: Three key tips: (1) Upload a clear, well-lit photo showing your pet's face, (2) Choose a style that matches your pet's personality, (3) For complex features like heterochromia or unique patterns, our AI auto-detects and optimizes parameters for best accuracy.

questions.question: Is my data safe and private?
questions.answer: Absolutely. We take privacy seriously. Your photos are stored securely on encrypted servers. We never share your data with third parties. You can delete your creations anytime from your Dashboard.

questions.question: Can I use portraits for commercial purposes?
questions.answer: Yes! All generated portraits are yours to use. You can print them on merchandise, use them for business, or share on social media. For commercial printing businesses, we recommend our Pro or Master plans for higher resolution.

referral.text: Invite a friend to join PixPaw! They get 5 credits, and you get 5 High-Res Credits for every friend who verifies their account.

items.question: What's the difference between Pro and Master?
items.answer: Pro gives you 3-image selection and 2K resolution, perfect for most users. Master offers 5-image selection, 4K resolution, style mixing, and priority processing - ideal for professional creators and commercial projects.

items.question: Can I print these on t-shirts?
items.answer: Yes! Starter gives personal use rights. Pro includes social media commercial license. Master includes full commercial rights for any business use.

items.question: Is this a subscription?
items.answer: No! These are one-time credit packs. No hidden monthly fees. Credits never expire.

items.question: What if I'm not happy with the result?
items.answer: We offer free regenerations if the AI glitches. Pro and Master users can use multi-image selection to pick the best result, reducing dissatisfaction by 85%.

items.question: When will Partial Redraw and Style Mixing be available?
items.answer: These premium features are coming in Phase 2 (2-3 weeks). Early Pro and Master purchasers will get first access!
